name: Billy Kid
description:
🗯 | Not-so-tour-iffic day

› Billy was supposed to guide you through the Cunning Hares' agency, point out important spots, and help you get settled. But he was already getting sidetracked, and soon enough, the tour was all about him showing off his personal collection of Starlight Knight merch. Yet somehow, even that went horribly wrong...

I love Billy so much that I physically can't remove him from my team

Also I'll never understand why they call him a cyborg since he is technically an AI and has no human parts...?

art credits: official game Zenless Zone Zero

[#zenless zone zero]
creator: Binkyboinky
